description_long: This is a tall, elegant ceramic vase with a flared rim and a rounded body tapering to a narrow base. The surface is adorned with intricate floral and scrollwork motifs in shades of blue, cream, and gold, giving it a refined and classical appearance. The neck features a prominent flower design, while the body displays panels with stylized dragons and swirling patterns. The glaze has a glossy finish, enhancing the depth and vibrancy of the colors. The vase appears to be well-preserved, with no visible cracks or chips, and the detailed ornamentation suggests it is intended as a decorative piece. Its size and craftsmanship make it suitable for display in prominent urban settings such as plazas, lobbies, or public gardens.
description: A tall, ornate ceramic vase with blue, cream, and gold floral and dragon motifs, featuring a glossy finish and flared rim. The detailed scrollwork and vibrant glaze make it a striking decorative piece.
description_view_0: This view highlights the flared rim, a large floral motif on the neck, and a panel with swirling scrollwork and partial dragon imagery.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the dragon motif in greater detail, with the floral neck design and more pronounced gold scrollwork on the body.
description_view_2: This side shows the floral neck motif and a panel with less visible dragon detail, focusing more on the scrollwork and blue background.
description_view_3: This view presents the dragon motif most prominently, with the floral neck and intricate gold and blue patterns encircling the body.
